title: Low drawdown is the ultimate goal for AI trading strategists and the data proves it.
author: thienpro2
selftext:
While many chase volatile pumps, the "Crypto Buffett" model on BingX shows why consistent risk management is king. Achieving a +64.24% APR is impressive, but doing it with a max drawdown of only 3.52% is the real breakthrough for long-term survival. 



This performance stems from BingX's $300M "All-in-AI" infrastructure. By building an AI-native exchange, they’ve moved beyond simple bots to sophisticated strategists like AI Master. It is a clear example of how institutional-grade risk control is becoming intuitive and accessible to retail traders through well-implemented AI tools.
